metadata.summary: NeoLogger is a versatile Python library that simplifies and enhances logging and notifications in your applications. NeoLogger seamlessly integrates with Slack and Microsoft Teams for real-time notifications and supports broadcasting messages over the STOMP protocol. With its straightforward API, it streamlines the incorporation of advanced logging and notification features, saving you development time and effort.

documentation:
# NeoLogger ![PyPI Downloads](https://static.pepy.tech/badge/neologger)

A collection of Python notification classes for enhanced logging, messaging, and Slack notifications. [Find me on PyPi.org](https://pypi.org/project/neologger/) ## Overview NeoLogger provides a set of tools to improve logging output with customizable styles, send messages over STOMP protocol, and send Slack notifications with rich formatting. ## Features - **NeoLogger**: Advanced logging with customizable colors, styles, and templates. - **StompBabbler**: Send messages over STOMP protocol to a specified queue. - **SlackNotification**: Assemble and send richly formatted notifications to Slack channels via webhooks. ## Installation You can install NeoLogger via pip: ```bash pip install neologger ``` ## Requirements Python 3.9 or higher ## Dependencies: stomp.py requests ## Package Content - [NeoLogger](docs/neologger.md) Examples of NeoLogger usage as well as examples for customisation for logs.

- [SlackNotifications](docs/slacknotifications.md) Examples of Slack Notification usage as well as examples for custom for notifications.

- [StompBabbler](docs/stompbabbler.md) Examples of Stomp Notification usage. ## Contributing Contributions are welcome! Please submit a pull request or open an issue to discuss changes. ## License This project is licensed under the MIT License - see the LICENSE file for details. ## Acknowledgments Inspired by the need for customizable logging and notification tools in Python applications. Utilizes the stomp.py library for STOMP protocol messaging. Utilizes the requests library for HTTP requests to Slack webhooks. ## Contact 📧 - For questions or suggestions, please contact Pablo Martinez at neolink3891@gmail.com 🌐 - You can also connect with me on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/orlando-martinez-2649051aa). ## Full Documentation For full documentation, please refer to our [GitHub repository](https://github.com/neolink3891/NeoLogger).

classes.name: neologger.core.Base.FontColour
documentation: ANSI escape sequences for font colors.

classes.name: neologger.core.Base.BackgroundColour

class_variables.name: neologger.core.Base.BackgroundColour.DARKGREY
documentation: Bright black background (appears as dark grey)
ANSI escape sequences for background colors.

classes.name: neologger.core.Base.FontStyle
documentation: ANSI escape sequences for font styles.

classes.name: neologger.main.NeoLogger

methods.name: neologger.main.NeoLogger.__init__
documentation:
Initialize the NeoLogger with default styling.

Args:
    initialized_by (str): The name of the module or script that initializes the logger.

methods.name: neologger.main.NeoLogger.set_log_font_colour
documentation:
Set the font colors for different parts of the log message.

Args:
    date_colour (str): ANSI escape code for the date color.
    file_colour (str): ANSI escape code for the file name color.
    function_colour (str): ANSI escape code for the function name color.
    text_colour (str): ANSI escape code for the log message text color.

methods.name: neologger.main.NeoLogger.set_log_font_style
documentation:
Set the font styles for different parts of the log message.

Args:
    date_style (str): ANSI escape code for the date style.
    file_style (str): ANSI escape code for the file name style.
    function_style (str): ANSI escape code for the function name style.
    text_style (str): ANSI escape code for the log message text style.

methods.name: neologger.main.NeoLogger.set_template
documentation:
Apply a predefined template to the logger.

Args:
    template_name (str): The name of the template to apply.

methods.name: neologger.main.NeoLogger.log_this
documentation:
Log a general information message with the current styling.

Args:
    message (str): The message to log.

methods.name: neologger.main.NeoLogger.log_this_warning
documentation:
Log a warning message with a warning icon and styling.

Args:
    message (str): The warning message to log.

methods.name: neologger.main.NeoLogger.log_this_ok
documentation:
Log a success message indicating an operation was OK.

Args:
    message (str): The success message to log.

methods.name: neologger.main.NeoLogger.log_this_error
documentation:
Log an error message with an error icon and styling.

Args:
    message (str): The error message to log.

methods.name: neologger.main.NeoLogger.log_this_completed
documentation:
Log a message indicating a task has been completed.

Args:
    message (str): The completion message to log.

methods.name: neologger.main.NeoLogger.log_this_success
documentation:
Log a success message with a star icon.

Args:
    message (str): The success message to log.

methods.name: neologger.main.NeoLogger.get_time_mark
documentation:
Get the current time in seconds since the Epoch.

Returns:
    float: The current time in seconds.

methods.name: neologger.main.NeoLogger.log_with_elapsed_time
documentation:
Log a message along with the elapsed time since a given start time.

Args:
    message (str): The message to log.
    start_time (float): The start time to calculate elapsed time from.

Returns:
    str: A string indicating the elapsed time.

A custom logger class that provides advanced logging features with customizable
colors, styles, and templates for log messages.

classes.name: neologger.main.StompBabbler

methods.name: neologger.main.StompBabbler.__init__
documentation:
Initialize the STOMP connection parameters.

Args:
    userName (str): The username for the STOMP server.
    userPassword (str): The password for the STOMP server.
    queue (str): The destination queue to send messages to.
    server (str): The STOMP server address.
    port (int): The port number of the STOMP server.

methods.name: neologger.main.StompBabbler.babble
documentation:
Send a message to the configured STOMP queue.

Args:
    message (dict): The message payload to send.

Returns:
    tuple: A tuple containing a boolean status and a message.
A class to send messages over STOMP (Simple Text Oriented Messaging Protocol).

classes.name: neologger.main.SlackNotification

methods.name: neologger.main.SlackNotification.__init__
documentation: Initialize the SlackNotification with default values.

methods.name: neologger.main.SlackNotification.add_data
documentation:
Add a field to the notification data.

Args:
    field_name (str): The name of the field.
    field_value (str): The value of the field.

methods.name: neologger.main.SlackNotification.set_hook
documentation:
Set the Slack webhook URL.

Args:
    hook (str): The Slack webhook URL.

methods.name: neologger.main.SlackNotification.assembly_notification
documentation:
Assemble the notification payload to send to Slack.

Args:
    title (str): The title of the notification.
    summary (str): A summary message.
    icon (str, optional): An emoji icon to include in the header. Defaults to "".

methods.name: neologger.main.SlackNotification.send
documentation:
Send the assembled notification to Slack.

Returns:
    tuple: A tuple containing a boolean status and a message.
A class to assemble and send notifications to Slack via a webhook.

classes.name: neologger.main.Table

methods.name: neologger.main.Table.__init__
documentation: Initialize the Table with default settings.

methods.name: neologger.main.Table.set_header
documentation:
Set the header row for the table.

Args:
    header (list): A list of column headers.

methods.name: neologger.main.Table.set_title
documentation:
Set the title of the table.

Args:
    text (str): The title of the table.

methods.name: neologger.main.Table.enable_total
documentation: Enable the display of the total number of rows.

methods.name: neologger.main.Table.enable_border
documentation: Enable the display of a border around the table.

methods.name: neologger.main.Table.new_row
documentation:
Create a new row instance.

Returns:
    TableRow: A new TableRow instance with the same number of columns as the header.

methods.name: neologger.main.Table.push_row
documentation:
Add a row to the table's data.

Args:
    row (TableRow): A TableRow instance to add to the table.

methods.name: neologger.main.Table.render
documentation: Construct and print the table based on the current settings.

methods.name: neologger.main.Table.calculate_sizes
documentation: Calculate column widths based on the longest content in each column.
A class to display data in a table format.

classes.name: neologger.main.TableRow

methods.name: neologger.main.TableRow.__init__
documentation: Initialize the TableRow with default settings.

methods.name: neologger.main.TableRow.add_data
documentation:
Add a list of data as a single row.

Args:
    data (list): A list of values for the row.

methods.name: neologger.main.TableRow.fill_row
documentation:
Add additional rows of data.

Args:
    data (list): A list of values to add as a new row.

Returns:
    bool: True if the data length matches the header length, otherwise False.
A class to represent a row in a table.
